extracted_metrics.forensic_reasoning_log: The auditor's report for Bulk Cement Corporation (India) Limited (a subsidiary) explicitly states in paragraph (xi) of the Annexure that the company has not incurred cash losses during the financial year covered by the audit.
extracted_metrics.verbatim_source_text: (xi) The company does not have any accumulated losses at the end of the financial year and has not incurred cash losses during the financial year covered by our audit and the immediately preceding financial year.
